blockingIssues.description: apply_refactor() method exists at line ~3118 but is never called in execute(). The code pushes to applied_opportunities but only simulates application with comments like 'In a full implementation, we would generate actual refactored code'. The method is dead code - never actually invoked.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add enforcement that cargo clippy must be run before completing validation. Workers should verify with 'cargo clippy --workspace' and fix all warnings before marking a feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-refactorer-validation worker did not run clippy despite skill procedure requiring it. The feature passed build but would have caught dead code warnings.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify feature scope boundaries. Consider requiring atomic commits per feature, or explicitly allowing multi-subsystem changes when necessary for a fix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-coder-agent-llm modified files in multiple crates (orchestrator, state, llm, tools) despite being scoped to CoderAgent.
